title: Unique 52076EU Plastic Free Paper Cups-266 ml-Construction Party-8 Count (Pack of 1), Multicolour
features: Ideal for serving drinks at a construction theme party
Combine with other construction party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Keep little builders cool during a hard day's work with these Construction Party Cups. With their bright and colourful design of construction trucks, signs and traffic cones, these paper cups will bring loads of style to any kid's construction themed birthday party. Fill these cups up with juice and then pass them out to the whole crew when it's time for lunch. As these cups are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
